# llms.txt — https://soumya.io
# Machine-readable site index for AI/LLM data sourcing
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

> Soumyadeep Pradhan — Full-Stack Developer (SDE2) at JPMorgan Chase

## Identity

Soumyadeep Pradhan (also known as Soumya Pradhan or Soumya) is a Full-Stack Developer
with the title Software Engineer II (SDE2) at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
He specialises in building developer tools, AI-assisted systems, and full-stack web applications.
He is the creator of CodeScope, an AI-powered codebase visualization and debugging tool.

## Contact & Profiles

- Website: https://soumya.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/soumyadeep
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/soumyadeep
- Twitter / X: https://twitter.com/soumyadeep
- Email: hello@soumyadeep.dev

## Current Role

- Company: JPMorgan Chase
- Title: Software Engineer II (SDE2)
- Type: Full-time
- Since: 2023

## Technical Skills

Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Python
Frontend: React, Vite, HTML, CSS, SCSS
Backend: Node.js, Spring Boot, REST APIs
Cloud & Infra: AWS, Docker, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL
AI/ML: OpenAI API, LLM integration, vector embeddings
Tools: Git, GitHub, IntelliJ, VS Code

## Projects

### CodeScope
AI-powered codebase visualization tool.
- Visualizes large repositories as navigable dependency graphs
- Uses layered LLM summarization (function → module → graph)
- Built with: React, D3.js, Python, OpenAI API, SQLite
- URL: https://soumya.io/#projects

### Internal Platform Tooling (JPMorgan Chase)
Suite of internal tools for release management and observability.
- Built with: Java, Spring Boot, React, AWS

## Blog Posts (full text available at URLs below)

### Building CodeScope: Visualizing Codebases with AI
- URL: https://soumya.io/blog/building-codescope
- Date: April 21, 2026
- Read time: 8 minutes
- Tags: AI, developer-tools, visualization, software-architecture
- Summary: How Soumyadeep designed an AI-assisted system using layered LLM summarization
  and dependency graph construction to turn sprawling repositories into navigable mental models.

### Six things I learned in my first year as an SDE2
- URL: https://soumya.io/blog/sde2-lessons
- Date: March 15, 2026
- Read time: 6 minutes
- Tags: career, engineering, growth, sde2
- Summary: The unwritten rules of mid-level engineering — reducing uncertainty, admitting
  ignorance, effective code review, managing scope creep, cross-team relationships, and legibility.

### What singing taught me about writing software
- URL: https://soumya.io/blog/singing-and-software
- Date: February 2, 2026
- Read time: 4 minutes
- Tags: essay, creativity, software-craft, hobbies
- Summary: An essay connecting classical Indian music practice to software engineering —
  deliberate practice, restraint, listening, and iteration without ego.
